data.title: Trump's Crypto Czar David Sacks Reveals US Government Missed Out On Gains Of Over $17 Billion By Selling Bitcoin Early
data.description: David Sacks, the White House’s “Crypto Czar,” highlighted a significant financial oversight by the U.S. government that cost it billions in gains.

data.title: Trump Threatens Russia With Sanctions Amid Ukraine Conflict As He Pushes For Peace
data.description: President Donald Trump is contemplating imposing extensive sanctions and tariffs on Russia. This move aims to pressure Russia into a peace agreement in the ongoing conflict with Ukraine.

data.title: Amazon Execs Question Microsoft's Quantum Computing Breakthrough, Says It's Necessary To 'Push Back' Against Satya Nadella's Comments: Report
data.description: Amazon executives have expressed skepticism over Microsoft's recent quantum computing claims.

data.title: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Broadcom, ChargePoint, BigBear.ai — And Tariff Whiplash Confounds Markets
data.description: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors' favorite stocks over the last week — here's a look at some of our top stories.

data.title: Elon Musk, Marco Rubio Clash In Heated White House Meeting In First Signs Of Tensions In Trump's Cabinet: Report
data.description: Elon Musk and Marco Rubio reportedly engaged in a heated debate during a meeting with President Donald Trump and other officials.
